gateRecords.item: Провести юридическую проверку публичной и закрытой частей проекта
gateRecords.requiredEvidence: Qualified legal/owner approval JSON plus reviewed public/private repository boundary evidence.
gateRecords.nextOwnerAction: Complete legal review and provide the approved release-gate evidence file.

gateRecords.requiredEvidence: Two real independent reviewer JSON files, full benchmark coverage, matching benchmarkVersion, adjudicated disagreements, and passing pnpm rule-qa:review.
gateRecords.nextOwnerAction: Select two independent reviewers, collect reviewer-1.review.json and reviewer-2.review.json, adjudicate disputes, then rerun the review gate.

gateRecords.requiredEvidence: Owner-provided DELIVERY_EVIDENCE.json proving the blocker benchmark review packet was sent to two intended independent reviewers, with matching benchmarkVersion and case-index SHA-256.
gateRecords.nextOwnerAction: Send the handoff packet to two intended independent reviewers, provide DELIVERY_EVIDENCE.json, then run the delivery gate.

gateRecords.item: Обновить статус Rule QA на VERIFIED_COMPLETE
gateRecords.requiredEvidence: Passed independent OD-023 reviewer gate plus release-quality confirmation for all 120 rules.
gateRecords.nextOwnerAction: Complete the independent reviewer gate, then rerun rule QA and update status.

gateRecords.item: Подтвердить release-quality всех 120 правил после reviewer gate

gateRecords.requiredEvidence: Manual accessibility review evidence for the required assistive technology/browser matrix.

gateRecords.requiredEvidence: VS Code Marketplace publisher account configured for SearchLint plus local VSIX readiness/update evidence.
gateRecords.nextOwnerAction: Configure the Marketplace publisher account, keep the local VSIX/update evidence current, and preserve publisher setup evidence outside secrets.

gateRecords.requiredEvidence: Signed and published VS Code extension on Marketplace, publisher metadata, and clean install/update evidence after publication.
gateRecords.nextOwnerAction: After publisher setup and legal approval, publish the VSIX through the Marketplace flow and preserve publication/install evidence.

gateRecords.item: Заменить `0.0.0`/beta versions на final release versions
gateRecords.requiredEvidence: Final 1.0.0 version approval, passing RC matrix, hosted npm publication proof, provenance, and clean public registry install.
gateRecords.nextOwnerAction: Run final publication only after all release gates pass, then preserve npm publication and install evidence.

gateRecords.requiredEvidence: Hosted npm workflow publication proof for 1.0.0-beta.0, npm provenance, beta dist-tag, and no private package publication.
gateRecords.nextOwnerAction: Complete legal/package metadata gates, configure npm trusted publishing, run the hosted workflow with publish=true and tag=beta, then preserve publication evidence.

gateRecords.requiredEvidence: Final 1.0.0 version approval, passing RC matrix, hosted npm publication proof, provenance, and clean public registry install.

gateRecords.requiredEvidence: Production-equivalent deployed target evidence, sanitized URLs/resource identifiers, and passing focused deployed acceptance command.

nonClaims: This report does not close release gates.
This report does not replace owner, reviewer, legal, security, provider, publication, deployment, or final release approval.
Present generated reports are intake signals only; checklist items remain open until their dedicated verifier passes and required external evidence exists.
